TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Paiwan Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://pwn.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn, title = {Paiwan Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: rusemansenay tua sipazaing nua hip-hop ti sengcingyian a kemasi kinateveteveljan a venarung tua hip-hop nua i tayuan taigaku (NTU Hip-hop) i tayuan. nakitulu timadju tua papucemelan i tayuan taigaku. semansenay sinanljavaran nasemenay ti sengcingyian ka i 2023 a cavilj i tua situcuan a hip-hop (i tua tilivi) tu "nu saljinga sun a sema kakituluan tua papucemelan tjaramacaqu sun a semiking. ljakua inikanan a sinipacalivat tjanuaken a siking nimaima a masan 1.35 a tjuljuran." pakasarekuya a tjuruvu taicu a kininemeneman a semanvililj tua sekacalisian a kisansemiking. == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: rus…ômans…ônaj tua sipazaiŇč nua hip-hup ti s…ôŇč ¶iŇčjian a k…ômasi kinat…ôv…ôt…ôv…ô éan a v…ônaruŇč tua hip-hup nua i tajuan taigaku (ntu hip-hup) i tajuan. nakitu…≠u tima…Ču tua papu ¶…ôm…ô…≠an i tajuan taigaku. s…ômans…ônaj sinan éavaran nas…ôm…ônaj ti s…ôŇč ¶iŇčjian ka i **** a ¶avi é i tua situ ¶uan a hip-hup (i tua ti…≠ivi) tu "nu sa éiŇča sun a s…ôma kakitu…≠uan tua papu ¶…ôm…ô…≠an ¶arama ¶aqu sun a s…ômikiŇč. éakua inikanan a sinipa ¶a…≠ivat ¶anuak…ôn a sikiŇč nimaima a masan *.** a ¶u éuran." pakasar…ôkuja a ¶uruvu tai ¶u a kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman a s…ômanvi…≠i é tua s…ôka ¶a…≠isian a kisans…ômikiŇč. == kasizuanan ==
S.FORM: rusemansenay tua sipazaing nua hip-hop ti sengcingyian a kemasi kinateveteveljan a venarung tua hip-hop nua i tayuan taigaku (NTU Hip-hop) i tayuan. nakitulu timadju tua papucemelan i tayuan taigaku. semansenay sinanljavaran nasemenay ti sengcingyian ka i 2023 a cavilj i tua situcuan a hip-hop (i tua tilivi) tu "nu saljinga sun a sema kakituluan tua papucemelan tjaramacaqu sun a semiking. ljakua inikanan a sinipacalivat tjanuaken a siking nimaima a masan 1.35 a tjuljuran." pakasarekuya a tjuruvu taicu a kininemeneman a semanvililj tua sekacalisian a kisansemiking. == kasizuanan ==
S.PHON: rus…ômans…ônaj tua sipazaiŇč nua hip-hup ti s…ôŇč ¶iŇčjian a k…ômasi kinat…ôv…ôt…ôv…ô éan a v…ônaruŇč tua hip-hup nua i tajuan taigaku (ntu hip-hup) i tajuan. nakitu…≠u tima…Ču tua papu ¶…ôm…ô…≠an i tajuan taigaku. s…ômans…ônaj sinan éavaran nas…ôm…ônaj ti s…ôŇč ¶iŇčjian ka i **** a ¶avi é i tua situ ¶uan a hip-hup (i tua ti…≠ivi) tu "nu sa éiŇča sun a s…ôma kakitu…≠uan tua papu ¶…ôm…ô…≠an ¶arama ¶aqu sun a s…ômikiŇč. éakua inikanan a sinipa ¶a…≠ivat ¶anuak…ôn a sikiŇč nimaima a masan *.** a ¶u éuran." pakasar…ôkuja a ¶uruvu tai ¶u a kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman a s…ômanvi…≠i é tua s…ôka ¶a…≠isian a kisans…ômikiŇč. == kasizuanan ==
